body.title: PROC_LIST_ABSORBED_BOOKS: add reading_list completed query + trigger fix
body.result: filter trace:// sources from completed query — commit 7ac868d5
body.resolution: fixed: list_absorbed_books now queries reading_list completed + trigger updated
body.description: list_absorbed_books() queries memory nodes only, not reading_list completions. Fix: also query reading_list WHERE status=completed and merge into report. Add completed trigger variants.
